package.name: welding_supervisor
package.description:
Intent-to-skill mission controller for the ROBIN welding HRI PoC. Subscribes to /intents and dispatches to the corresponding skill action servers. Handles intent types: - MOVE_TO_HOME, EXECUTE_SEAM, ESTOP (original) - START_PROCESS, REQUEST_AI_RECOMMENDATION, MANUAL_ADJUST, PAUSE_PROCESS, RESUME_PROCESS, STOP_PROCESS, LAUNCH_NEW_DOE (ROBIN dashboard buttons)
Implements the same MissionController pattern as ErgoBot_AI's llm_supervisor/mission_controller.py.
